stages.name: test-project-sub
stages.command: cat /workspace/project/README.md > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'PROJECT_READ_OK' || echo 'PROJECT_READ_FAIL'; touch /workspace/project/nope.txt 2>/dev/null && echo 'PROJECT_WRITE_OK' || echo 'PROJECT_WRITE_FAIL'; echo 'gen' > /workspace/project/src/generated/output.txt 2>/dev/null && echo 'SUB_WRITE_OK' || echo 'SUB_WRITE_FAIL'; cat /workspace/project/__art__/PIPELINE.json > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'ART_VISIBLE' || echo 'ART_HIDDEN'; echo '[STAGE_COMPLETE]'
